description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure with a prominent, exaggerated phallus extending outward from the lap. The figure wears a cylindrical headdress with two dots on top and has a broad, smiling face with detailed facial features. One arm is raised with a clenched fist, while the other rests on the knee. The figure sits on a square pedestal adorned with geometric patterns, including triangles and a border of alternating shapes. The surface is uniformly colored in a reddish-pink hue, resembling terracotta or painted ceramic. The overall style is reminiscent of pre-Columbian or ancient fertility figures, with stylized anatomical exaggeration and symbolic motifs.
description: A reddish-pink seated human figure sculpture with a cylindrical headdress and exaggerated phallus, sitting on a patterned square pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smiling face, raised arm, and the full frontal display of the exaggerated phallus and pedestal patterns.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the cylindrical headdress, and the length of the phallus extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the headdress, shoulders, and the geometric patterns on the back of the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the side of the face, arm, and the phallus, as well as the pedestal's side patterns.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with exaggerated phallus
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
